transactions.description: New York Yankees sent SS Anthony Volpe on a rehab assignment to Somerset Patriots.
New York Yankees sent SS Anthony Volpe on a rehab assignment to Somerset Patriots.
New York Yankees placed DH Giancarlo Stanton on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 25, 2026. Right calf strain.
New York Yankees recalled 3B Max Schuemann from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees designated LF Randal Grichuk for assignment.
